cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/boolkit/parse.py b/boolkit/parse.py
index 6cb4201..908e4b3 100644
--- a/boolkit/parse.py
+++ b/boolkit/parse.py
@@ -1,7 +1,12 @@
+_TRUE = {"true", "yes", "1", "on"}
+_FALSE = {"false", "no", "0", "off"}
+
+
 def parse_bool(s):
     """Parse a string into a bool."""
-    if s == "true":
+    key = s.strip().lower()
+    if key in _TRUE:
         return True
-    if s == "false":
+    if key in _FALSE:
         return False
     raise ValueError(s)

cases.name: case_sensitive
cases.diff:
diff --git a/boolkit/parse.py b/boolkit/parse.py
index 6cb4201..d3b257c 100644
--- a/boolkit/parse.py
+++ b/boolkit/parse.py
@@ -1,7 +1,12 @@
+_TRUE = {"true", "yes", "1", "on"}
+_FALSE = {"false", "no", "0", "off"}
+
+
 def parse_bool(s):
     """Parse a string into a bool."""
-    if s == "true":
+    key = s.strip()
+    if key in _TRUE:
         return True
-    if s == "false":
+    if key in _FALSE:
         return False
     raise ValueError(s)

cases.name: no_raise_on_unknown
cases.diff:
diff --git a/boolkit/parse.py b/boolkit/parse.py
index 6cb4201..b453a71 100644
--- a/boolkit/parse.py
+++ b/boolkit/parse.py
@@ -1,7 +1,6 @@
+_TRUE = {"true", "yes", "1", "on"}
+
+
 def parse_bool(s):
     """Parse a string into a bool."""
-    if s == "true":
-        return True
-    if s == "false":
-        return False
-    raise ValueError(s)
+    return s.strip().lower() in _TRUE

cases.name: no_strip

+
+
 def parse_bool(s):
     """Parse a string into a bool."""
-    if s == "true":
